_comment: Pure Sprinter (Sprint=A, Mile=B, Medium/Long=G per Android DB). Speed-Power priority with everything else trimmed. Stamina targets aggressively low since she only races up to Mile -- pushing her Stamina to 800+ wastes turns she should spend on Speed. Long-distance stamina floor at 300 because the solver would otherwise penalize Sprint/Mile picks late-game when stamina hasn't grown -- but for Bakushin O that's correct behavior, she shouldn't be in long-distance races at all. epithet_value bumped for when her signature 'Sakura Burst' epithet (or whatever her catalog title is) gets auto-picked.

4._comment: Trackblazer for a Sprinter. Stamina floor dropped to 300 since she has Medium/Long=G aptitude (the solver would never schedule a long race anyway, but the floor was penalizing late-game G2 sprint picks when stamina lagged). targetOptionalRaceCount at 36 (default) since sprint-only races aren't as plentiful as miler schedules. distancePreferenceMode 'strict' pushes the solver to penalize off-aptitude distances harder.
